programs.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programs.sub_title: Elinor's Fishy Friend; Do the Crane Dance
programs.desc: Elinor finds what she thinks is a fish in the pond, but she and her friends realize it's a tadpole turning into a frog; Elinor, Ari and Olive make up a dance.

programs.title: Alma's Way
programs.desc: Alma helps Andre prepare for a checkers tournament; Alma and Rafia compete for World's Greatest Artist.

programs.title: Molly of Denali
programs.desc: Molly must find her mom's plane keys so she can get home in time for Mother's Day; Trini spots a talking white bird.

programs.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programs.sub_title: I Am Cesar Chavez; I Am Dolores Huerta
programs.desc: Cesar Chavez helps Xavier, Yadina and Brad find the inspiration to tackle a big mess in the playroom; Dolores Huerta teaches Xavier, Yadina and Brad that it is important to speak up when they see someone in need.

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: A 1960 Ansel Adams Portfolio III: Yosemite Valley; a Persian Qashqai Gabbeh rug circa 1935; 1959 JFK's boxer shorts with signed photo.

programs.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programs.desc: The celebrity version of "Antiques Road Trip" sees two antique experts paired up with celebrity guests as they scour for antiques on a road trip around the country. Each episode features different expert and celebrity pairs who search for valuable items at bargain-basement prices. Once they have found their items, they then head to auction where the collectibles are put up for bid, with any profits made at auction donated to charity.
